title: T-032 — MODAL-07-01 Run Scheduler modal (run_scheduler_modal)
prompt:
# T-032 — MODAL-07-01 Run Scheduler modal

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §4.1.6, §8.1 §6 [Run Scheduler] action
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:21-95 (`run_scheduler_modal`)
UX: design/07-PLANNING-EXT-UX.md:428-449
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement Dialog modal collecting horizon (7d|14d), line_ids[] (≥1), include_forecast bool, optimizer_version → invokes Server Action runOptimizerAction → POST /api/scheduler/run.

## Implementation contract
1. New `apps/web/src/components/scheduler/RunSchedulerModal.tsx` using shadcn Dialog + react-hook-form + zodResolver.
2. Zod schema requires line_ids min 1; optimizer_version reads from feature_flags table key 'allergen_sequencing_optimizer_v2'.
3. Server Action `apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/run-action.ts`: RBAC guard (Planner Advanced or Admin), calls POST /api/scheduler/run with client-generated UUID v7.
4. Emits outbox via API; success → toast + close + revalidate Gantt.

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/RunSchedulerModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/run-action.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/__tests__/RunSchedulerModal.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Planner Advanced role + valid form (horizon=7, lines=[LINE-01]), when [Run] clicked, then Server Action posts to /api/scheduler/run with new UUID v7 and toast 'Run queued' shows
2. Given the rendered modal, when compared to prototype design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:21-95, then it has the same horizon radio group, same line checkbox list, same [Run]/[Cancel] buttons, and uses the same shadcn primitives (Dialog, Checkbox, Button, Label, Badge) — parity verified by RTL snapshot + checklist (structural + visual + interaction)
3. Given Operator role, when modal mounts, then it raises RBAC guard error (caller should not even open)

## Test strategy
- RED: write apps/web/src/components/scheduler/__tests__/RunSchedulerModal.test.tsx covering form submit + parity + RBAC
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/RunSchedulerModal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not generate UUID v7 server-side (PRD R14 says client-supplied)
- Do not allow line_ids empty (Zod min 1)
- Do not bypass RBAC guard in Server Action

pipeline_inputs.description: Dialog with horizon/line_ids/include_forecast form, client-generated UUID v7, Server Action invokes /api/scheduler/run.
pipeline_inputs.details: react-hook-form + zodResolver. Translation notes: mock setTimeout fake submit → real Server Action; mock PEXT_LINES → Drizzle query; hardcoded labels → next-intl; emit outbox via API. Parity vs prototype with structural + visual + interaction.
